suggestions.topic: Hegotá EIP proposals: return deposits for distinct credentials and custom suite thresholds
suggestions.rationale: Two EIPs explicitly deferred from ACDC #178 with expected revisit at this call. These are potential non-headliner additions to Hegotá fork.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-4 readiness and BAL devnet-7 status
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #178 targeted BAL devnet-7 for May 19 and Glamsterdam devnet-4 for EOW (May 20-21). Critical to assess launch status, blockers, and client readiness including execution-apis #796 approval.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8025 (optional execution proofs / zkEVM) feedback for Hegotá inclusion
suggestions.rationale: Presented in ACDC #178 as Hegotá proposal with action item for all teams to review updated PR #11604. Given 4-day review window, feedback collection is now due.

suggestions.topic: Committee attestation broadcast spec (ethp2p #5) for Hegotá inclusion decision
suggestions.rationale: Sukun's proposal from ACDC #178 targets 4x committee size increase enabling 8-slot epochs. Major p2p change requiring decision on Hegotá inclusion timeline.
ACDC #178 showed Prysm worst-case ~6s validation time with agreement on client optimizations as path forward. Lighthouse asked to share benchmark branch; status update needed before devnet-4.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7688 (forward-compatible SSZ) timeline for removing 190M gas cap
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #178 decided to cap gas limit at 190M for devnet-4 as temporary fix, relying on 7688 in a later devnet to lift cap. Need clarity on which devnet will include 7688.

suggestions.topic: ETH/72 blob devnet progress and spec freeze status
suggestions.rationale: ETH/72 deferred from Glamsterdam devnet-4 pending blob devnet spec freeze. Update on separate blob devnet track and potential Glamsterdam integration timeline.

suggestions.topic: Hegotá non-headliner proposal window closure date
suggestions.rationale: ACDC #177 noted proposal window opened but end date TBD based on Glamsterdam progress. With devnet-4 launching, need to establish CFI deadline for Hegotá proposals.
